news_items.headline: Dad strength, indeed: Ohtani homers on eve of Father's Day after birth of 2nd child
Schwarber's 3 HRs, Harper's cycle propel Phillies
news_items.summary: Kyle Schwarber hit three home runs, and Bryce Harper became the 11th player in franchise history to hit for the cycle as the Phillies beat the Mets 15-3 on Saturday night.

news_items.headline: Dodgers' Ohtani announces he is a father again
news_items.summary: Los Angeles superstar Shohei Ohtani announced on social media Saturday that he is a father again, and hours later, he hit a homer in the Dodgers' 3-2 loss to the Orioles.

news_items.headline: Buxton grand slam keys Twins' 10-run rally in 5th
news_items.summary: Byron Buxton hit a grand slam in the Twins' 10-run fifth inning against the Diamondbacks on Saturday night, and Minnesota went on to win 16-8.

news_items.headline: Brewers' Murphy set to have hip, back surgeries
news_items.summary: Brewers manager Pat Murphy said Saturday he's planning to have back surgery on Thursday, when the team is off, and a procedure on his hip during the All-Star break.

news_items.headline: Tigers' Verlander (hamstring) likely out 'weeks'
news_items.summary: Tigers veteran right-hander Justin Verlander has a left hamstring strain and likely will be out "weeks," according to manager A.J. Hinch.

news_items.headline: Soroka latest D-backs starting pitcher to hit IL
news_items.summary: The Diamondbacks lost another starting pitcher to injury on Saturday, placing right-hander Michael Soroka on the 15-day injured list with a strained right glute.

news_items.headline: Marlins' Hicks scratched due to back tightness
news_items.summary: Marlins slugger Liam Hicks was scratched for their game against the San Francisco Giants on Saturday because of back tightness.

news_items.headline: Red Sox place Kiner-Falefa (forearm) on IL
news_items.summary: The Red Sox placed utility infielder Isiah Kiner-Falefa on the injured list Saturday with left forearm inflammation.

news_items.headline: Mariners all wrong against another lefty, lose 5-1 to Sox
news_items.summary: Today’s loss to the Red Sox left much to be desired, but it started out promisingly enough. Emerson Hancock was clean the first time through the order, picking up four strikeouts, three of which came because a Red Sox hitter left the bat on his shoulder. The rearranged left side of the infield even made […]

news_items.headline: O’s avoid disaster, make Rogers gem stand up in 3-2 win
news_items.summary: They nearly blew it in the ninth inning, but Yennier Cano was able to lock things down just in time.

news_items.headline: Schwarber homers TWICE in one inning ... and later adds a third!
Bazzana Goes Bananas To Lead Guardians To 8-1 Win
news_items.summary: This was maybe my favorite performance from any Guardians player this season. Seeing Travis Bazzana blossom into a star in his rookie season brings me so much joy. After his 4-4 2 HR performance tonight, he now leads all 2B in the MLB in WRC+ and OPS. I don’t know if he’ll get the votes […]
